mapper.update: UPDATE production_plan SET plan_status = '진행' WHERE plan_status = '대기' AND SYSDATE >= plan_start
mapper.select: SELECT emp_num AS num, ename AS name FROM emp ORDER BY emp_num
SELECT facility_num AS num, facility_name AS name FROM facility
SELECT item_num AS num, name AS name, type AS type FROM item WHERE type IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY type, name

SELECT pp.plan_num, pp.plan_id, pp.plan_qty, CASE WHEN pp.plan_status = '취소' THEN '취소' WHEN SYSDATE > pp.plan_end THEN '완료' WHEN SYSDATE >= pp.plan_start THEN '진행' ELSE '대기' END AS plan_status, pp.plan_start, pp.plan_end, pp.emp_num, pp.item_num, pp.created_at, i.name AS item_name, i.code, i.type, e.ename, f.facility_num, f.facility_name, NVL(wo.currentqty, 0) AS currentqty FROM production_plan pp LEFT JOIN item i ON pp.item_num = i.item_num LEFT JOIN emp e ON pp.emp_num = e.emp_num LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_num, facility_num FROM ( SELECT item_num, facility_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_num ORDER BY flow) AS rn FROM process WHERE facility_num IS NOT NULL ) WHERE rn = 1 ) pr ON pp.item_num = pr.item_num LEFT JOIN facility f ON pr.facility_num = f.facility_num LEFT JOIN ( SELECT plan_num, SUM(current_qty) AS currentqty FROM work_order GROUP BY plan_num ) wo ON pp.plan_num = wo.plan_num WHERE pp.plan_id = #{plan_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CHR(NVL(MAX(ASCII(plan_id)), 64) + 1) FROM production_plan
INSERT INTO production_plan (plan_num, plan_id, plan_qty, plan_status, plan_start, plan_end, emp_num, item_num, content, created_at) VALUES ( PROD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{plan_id}, #{plan_qty}, '대기', #{plan_start}, #{plan_end}, #{emp_num}, #{item_num}, #{content}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT work_order_id, order_qty, work_status, order_start, order_end, current_qty, ename, total_count FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT wo.order_id AS work_order_id, wo.order_qty, wo.order_status AS work_status, wo.order_start, wo.order_end, wo.current_qty, e.ename, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN emp e ON wo.emp_num = e.emp_num WHERE wo.plan_num = #{plan_num} ORDER BY wo.order_num DESC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}
